Package glide.api.models.commands.geospatial

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    GeoSearchOrigin.SearchOrigin
    Basic interface.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    GeoAddOptions
    Optional arguments for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands.geoadd(String, Map, GeoAddOptions) command.
    GeoSearchOptions
    Optional arguments for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands.geosearch(String, GeoSearchOrigin.SearchOrigin, GeoSearchShape, GeoSearchOptions) command, options include: WITHDIST: Also return the distance of the returned items from the specified center point.
    GeoSearchOptions.GeoSearchOptionsBuilder  
    GeoSearchOrigin
    The query's starting point for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands command.
    GeoSearchOrigin.CoordOrigin
    The search origin represented by a GeospatialData position.
    GeoSearchOrigin.MemberOrigin
    The search origin represented by an existing member.
    GeoSearchOrigin.MemberOriginBinary
    The search origin represented by an existing member.
    GeoSearchResultOptions
    Optional arguments for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands.geosearch(String, GeoSearchOrigin.SearchOrigin, GeoSearchShape, GeoSearchOptions) command that contains up to 3 optional inputs, including: SortOrder to order the search results by the distance to the center point of the search area.
    GeoSearchShape
    The query's shape for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands command.
    GeoSearchStoreOptions
    Optional arguments for GeospatialIndicesBaseCommands.geosearchstore(String, String, GeoSearchOrigin.SearchOrigin, GeoSearchShape, GeoSearchStoreOptions) command.
    GeoSearchStoreOptions.GeoSearchStoreOptionsBuilder  
    GeospatialData
    Represents a geographic position defined by longitude and latitude.
    The exact limits, as specified by EPSG:900913 / EPSG:3785 / OSGEO:41001 are the following: Valid longitudes are from -180 to 180 degrees.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    GeoUnit
    Enumeration representing distance units options for the geospatial command.
